description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat, dark roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, complemented by large windows and a wooden slat feature on one side. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence, enclosing a small landscaped yard with a mix of trees, shrubs, and a patch of grass. The front of the house features a covered porch area with blue accents and a visible entryway. The overall design is minimalist, with an emphasis on open space and natural light, typical of contemporary urban homes.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light gray walls, large windows, and a fenced yard with landscaping. The design is minimalist and contemporary, featuring a covered porch and wooden accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, blue accents, and main entryway, with a tree and part of the yard visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden slat feature, large windows, and the full extent of the fenced yard with landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced garden area, a large tree, and minimal window openings on the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain wall with windows, the edge of the yard, and a tree outside the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with blue accents, single main door, and minimal decorative elements
